opportunities.roleTitle: Content Producer - League of Legends: Wild Rift
requiredQualifications: Players form the foundation of our community and it’s for them that we continue to evolve and improve the <em>League of Legends</em> experience.</p> <p>We’re looking for humble but ambitious, razor-sharp professionals who can teach us a thing or two.

Your sharp awareness and transparent communication style will allow you to maintain a comprehensive understanding of campaign requirements, advocate fiercely for project needs, and ensure every deliverable hits the mark for players.</p> <p><strong>Required Knowledge & Skills:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Campaign & Production Strategy:</strong> Expertise in managing the full lifecycle of complex marketing campaigns, including video and art production.</li> <li><strong>Creative Asset Management:</strong> High proficiency in handling large volumes of creative assets, ensuring consistent quality and brand alignment across all projects.</li> <li><strong>Design & Feedback:</strong> Deep understanding of the visual production process with the ability to provide actionable, daily feedback to creative teams.</li> <li><strong>Project Management & Tools:</strong> Expert in project management methodologies and tools (e.g., Airtable, Favro, Smartsheet) and digital asset management (e.g., Iconik, Brandfolder).</li> <li><strong>Technical Proficiency:</strong> Skilled in delivery validation using tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, After Effects, Illustrator).</li> <li><strong>Stakeholder & Vendor Management:</strong> Strong communication skills to effectively lead and coordinate internal teams, cross-functional partners, and external vendors.</li> <li><strong>Operational Resilience:</strong> Ability to navigate ambiguity, manage change, resolve conflicts, and maintain composure in a fast-paced, fluctuating creative environment.</li> <li><strong>Detail-Oriented Communication:</strong> Sharp attention to detail with excellent writing, editing, and communication skills to uphold high creative standards.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Strategy & Planning:</strong> Co-author patch and campaign strategies in partnership with Brand, Creative, and Leadership, ensuring all content aligns with team and business goals.</li> <li><strong>Production Execution:</strong> Oversee the end-to-end production of all patch content—from concept to delivery—ensuring high quality, consistent brand standards, and timely execution.</li> <li><strong>Player-Centric Focus:</strong> Drive a community-first content approach, ensuring every patch resonates with players and delivers a high-quality experience.</li> <li><strong>Resource & Workflow Management:</strong> With the Content Production Lead, optimize patch budgeting, manage resource allocation, and oversee the Central Airtable Publishing System (CAPS) to streamline approval, production and content scheduling workflows.</li> <li><strong>Performance & Optimization:</strong> Monitor content performance metrics, conduct regular quality audits, and implement data-driven improvements to refine future content strategies.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration:</strong> Partner closely with marketing, product, and creative teams to ensure seamless execution and support for broader business objectives.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Required Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Fluent in spoken English and Mandarin.</li> <li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with a proven ability to bridge gaps between creative, technical, and business stakeholders.</li> <li>5+ years of experience in campaign, production, or project management, with a proven track record of leading creative project delivery and managing complex marketing assets.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Desired Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in mobile, PC, and/or console games marketing.</li> <li>Specific experience in UA & ASO project management.</li> </ul> <p>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.
We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

You will be a fulcrum of all the region's outbound activity. </p> <p><strong>Location:</strong> São Paulo (plus a few weeks in HQ for an extended orientation) </p> <h4><strong>You Will:</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>Holistic Regional Strategy:</strong> Design a scalable marketing framework that can be adapted for Tier 1 markets (high volume) and Tier 2/3 markets (high growth).</li> <li><strong>Trilingual Content Ecosystem:</strong> Oversee the "transcreation" of all marketing assets, ensuring the brand speaks Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese with native-level nuance.</li> <li><strong>Agile GTM Execution:</strong> Lead product launches across the region, prioritizing markets based on data, barrier to entry, and product-market fit.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Border Community & Influencer Growth:</strong> Leverage the region’s high social media penetration to build a loyal community through influencer partnerships and localized social channels (WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok).</li> <li><strong>Policy & Comms Collaboration:</strong> Work closely with legal and policy teams to navigate the varied regulatory landscapes of the region, ensuring brand safety and compliance.</li> <li><strong>Event Strategy:</strong> Identify and secure a presence at the most influential regional conferences and trade shows to establish industry authority.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>You Have:</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>8+ years of marketing experience</strong> with a deep, pan-regional focus across Latin America.</li> <li><strong>Independent drive</strong> with proven ability to operate within a strategic framework while driving outcomes with less day to day oversight. </li> <li><strong>Native or bilingual proficiency in Spanish and Portuguese</strong>, plus English.

This is non-negotiable for regional oversight.</li> <li><strong>Broad Market Knowledge:</strong> Experience managing marketing efforts in diverse environments, from audience demographics to policy nuances to varied audience perception to economics. </li> <li><strong>5+ years in Consumer Tech:</strong> Deep understanding of the LATAM consumer journey, specifically mobile-first behaviors and local trust barriers.</li> <li><strong>Strategic Influence:</strong> Proven ability to advocate for regional needs (budget, product features, localizations) at a US-based HQ.</li> <li><strong>Data-Driven Scrappiness:</strong> Ability to drive growth in "low-data" environments by being resourceful and hands-on.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

requiredQualifications: As we scale internationally, we're looking for a seasoned product manager to shape WorkSolo's product vision, roadmap, and creator experience for global markets.

Key Responsibilities Product Strategy & Roadmap Own the product strategy and roadmap for WorkSolo's overseas markets, aligning HQ vision with local creator needs Define product North Star metrics and success criteria (activation, retention, creation depth, publish-through rate, monetization) Translate market insights, competitive intelligence, and creator behavior trends into prioritized product bets AI-Native Feature Design Lead end-to-end product design for AI creation workflows — covering ideation, generation, editing, collaboration, and publishing Define and ship features around multimodal generation (text-to-image, text-to-video, voice, 3D), agentic workflows, asset management, and creator monetization Partner with AI/ML, design, and engineering teams to ship high-quality experiences at startup speed User Research & Market Insight Build a continuous discovery system: creator interviews, usability studies, community listening, and quantitative analysis Synthesize insights from Discord, Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, and TikTok creator ecosystems into product requirements Develop deep personas for AI creators (independents, studios, professional creatives) and map their end-to-end workflows Localization & Market Fit Drive product localization strategy across language, payment, content policy, and creator economics for key markets (North America, EU, JP/KR, SEA, LATAM) Define market-specific feature variants, onboarding flows, and pricing/packaging in collaboration with operations and growth Champion the international user's voice within HQ; influence the global product roadmap with regional priorities Data & Experimentation Build a rigorous experimentation culture: hypothesis → A/B test → learning loops Define instrumentation requirements and partner with data teams on dashboards, funnels, and cohort analysis Use analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, Looker, etc.) to monitor product health and identify growth levers AIGC Ecosystem & Partnerships Stay at the forefront of the global AI creator tools ecosystem (workflows, toolchains, emerging models, and creator behavior trends) Identify integration and partnership opportunities with model providers, distribution platforms, and creator ecosystems Represent WorkSolo at industry events, creator conferences, and AIGC community gatherings Cross-Functional Leadership Lead cross-functional squads of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists across HQ (China) and LA Own clear written PRDs, specs, and trade-off rationales; drive alignment across time zones Collaborate closely with overseas operations, marketing, and BD to ensure go-to-market readiness Who We Look For Qualifications 5–8 years of product management experience, ideally within creator tools, AIGC platforms, content/media, or developer-facing creative products Proven track record shipping consumer or prosumer products at scale in international markets Deep familiarity with the global AI creator tools landscape — including generation tools (Midjourney, Runway, Pika, Kling, Sora), creation workflow tools (Notion AI, Canva AI, Adobe Firefly, CapCut), and creator platform ecosystems (YouTube Studio, TikTok Creator Marketplace, Patreon, Substack) Hands-on experience designing AI-native features (prompting UX, multimodal generation, agentic workflows, model orchestration) is strongly preferred Strong data literacy; comfortable defining metrics, designing experiments, and using analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, Looker, SQL) Experience operating across Western social platforms (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Discord, Reddit, X) and understanding how AI creators discover, adopt, and evangelize creation tools Excellent written and verbal English communication; Mandarin Chinese is a strong plus for HQ collaboration Self-starter with startup mentality; comfortable operating with ambiguity, time-zone span, and the speed of an early-stage international expansion Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Design, HCI, Media, or a related field; equivalent practical experience welcome Nice to Have Prior experience launching products from 0 → 1 in overseas markets Personal creator background or active participation in AIGC creator communities Familiarity with creator monetization models (subscriptions, marketplaces, revenue share, tipping) Experience working across China–US dual-HQ structures Location State(s) US-California-Los Angeles The expected base pay range for this position in the location(s) listed above is $102,200.00 to $191,400.00 per year.

Actual pay may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience.
Employees hired for this position may be eligible for a sign on payment, relocation package, and restricted stock units, which will be evaluated on a case-by-case basis.
Subject to the terms and conditions of the plans in effect, hired applicants are also eligible for medical, dental, vision, life and disability benefits, and participation in the Company’s 401(k) plan.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

We're looking for someone who is passionate about Roblox and growing the local creator community in their region.</p> <p><strong>You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Physically located in the Australia or New Zealand</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop an understanding of Roblox moderation rules and guidelines</li> <li>Identify and engage with potential partners within the developer community to build and maintain a strong partnership pipeline</li> <li>Plan and execute online and offline community events, workshops, and initiatives that inspire and connect developers requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

You will report to the Critical Harms, Intelligence, Investigations, and Operations Manager.</p> <p>Please Note: This role may review graphic, controversial, and sometimes offensive content in line with Roblox’s content moderation practices. </p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <p><strong>Incident Investigation and Triage</strong></p> <ul> <li>Support, then lead, rapid investigations into critical and complex incidents, including but not limited to threats against child safety, violent extremism, and other high-severity harms.</li> <li>Utilize internal tools, data analysis, and open-source intelligence (OSINT) techniques to gather evidence, establish facts, and determine the root cause of incidents.</li> <li>Act as the primary point of contact for relevant parties across the company, to include company leadership. </li> <li>Ensure all investigations are documented thoroughly, accurately, and completed in a timely manner.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Emergency Response and Coordination</strong></p> <ul> <li>Operate within a 24/7 on-call rotation to respond immediately to high-risk and/or time-sensitive incidents that pose significant risk to users, the platform, or the company.</li> <li>Lead incident response by coordinating cross-functional stakeholders to ensure a unified and effective investigation and response. </li> <li>Draft and deliver real-time, high-stakes communications to leadership regarding incident status, impact assessment, and mitigation efforts.</li> <li>Develop, test, and maintain robust incident response playbooks and protocols for various critical harms scenarios. </li> </ul> <ul> <li>Support detailed post-mortem reviews (Root Cause Analysis) of investigations to identify areas for improvement in process, policy, or technology.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A Bachelor's Degree is required, or, in lieu of a degree, a minimum of 1 year of relevant experience in investigations, incident management, and/or policy enforcement on a social platform.</li> <li>Experience managing high-pressure, sensitive, and complex investigations with moderate to high levels of supervision.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical and sensitive issues clearly to executive audiences and non-technical partners.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to use data analysis, internal dashboards, and investigation tools to support fact-finding. </li> <li>Familiarity with online safety issues to include exposure to high-severity risk content is preferred. </li> opportunities.roleTitle: Game Producer, Live Experience - Wild Rift (Contractor)
requiredQualifications: You are organized, collaborative, and able to support live operations in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment.</p> <p>That's where you come in.</p> <p>As a <strong>Game Producer, Live Experience (Contractor)</strong> on the Wild Rift team, you will support the Live Experience team in executing day-to-day live operations for the RoW (Rest of World) regions.

You will work closely with product, design, operations, and QA teams to ensure in-game operational content is configured, delivered, and launched accurately and efficiently, helping provide a stable and high-quality player experience. </p> <h2><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Support day-to-day live operations execution for Wild Rift RoW regions, including in-game events, rewards, and mail configuration and delivery.</li> <li>Prepare and maintain operation whitepapers, execution documents, and related operational configuration documentation.</li> <li>Support patch-related operational work, including event setup, reward distribution, and other live operation tasks.</li> <li>Coordinate and track in-game banner/key art (“face image”) related requests and support publishing workflows.</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, QA, and operations to ensure operational content is delivered on time and with quality.</li> <li>Assist in reviewing operational configurations, tracking issue resolutions, and supporting day-to-day live service stability.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>2+ years of experience in the game industry or related fields.</li> <li>Strong execution skills, sense of ownership, and communication abilities.</li> <li>Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple parallel tasks.</li> <li>Familiar with basic game operation workflows and has an understanding of game event operations.</li> <li>Passion for games.</li> <li>Fluent in Mandarin Chinese.</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience in game live operations execution or event configuration is a plus.</li> <li>Experience supporting mobile game operations is a plus.</li> <li>Basic English reading, writing, or communication skills are a plus.</li> </ul> <p>Please include both your resume and a cover letter.

human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>As the Product Manager of this group, you are the product leader for growth initiatives and new product launches for consumer facing experiences within the Payments and Subscriptions team.</p> <p>You Will:</p> <ul> <li>Lead the long term strategy for subscriptions including but not limited to growing existing subscriber base, increasing retention, international growth and developer led growth. </li> <li>Act as the lead for consumer app. </li> <li>Work across the company to galvanize and inspire support from different teams in order to offer exceptional value propositions for subscribers and non-subscribers. </li> <li>Drive Support Operations and is a full time hybrid position based in our Gurugram, India offices.</p> <p>Shift: 2pm-10:30pm IST (Cabs will be provided)</p> <h3><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You Will:</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Provide Deep-Dive Analysis:</strong> Move beyond engagement metrics to perform deep-dive research into specific audience segments </li> <li><strong>Long-term Sentiment Mapping:</strong> Track the evolution of platform sentiment over months and years, identifying the root causes of major shifts in user trust or affinity.</li> <li><strong>Real-Time Monitoring & Signal Detection: </strong>Continuously monitor social platforms, forums, and influential voices for Roblox, our executive leadership, and emerging platform trends.</li> <li><strong>Trend Forecasting:</strong> Use predictive modeling and social signal detection to forecast "the next big thing" in digital play and social interaction.</li> <li><strong>Turn insights into action:</strong> by building formalized and detailed analysis into trends, escalations and user behavior on social media and escalating to internal stakeholders to do more detailed, on platform analysis.</li> <li><strong>Feature Feedback Loops:</strong> Synthesize community feedback into structured "Insights Reports" for Product and Engineering teams to help prioritize the development of new platform features or to iterate and improve on existing.</li> <li><strong>Reporting & Strategic Coordination: </strong>Develop and maintain digestible dashboards and trackers using data visualization tools to support editorial and leadership teams.</li> <li><strong>Advanced Querying:</strong> Build and refine complex Boolean queries and "topic clusters" to capture nuanced conversations across fragmented digital spaces.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in a fast-paced technology company, with a focus on customer support or social media operations.</li> <li>5+ years of experience leveraging social media and web based content for trends, analysis and insight to enable and inform internal stakeholders.</li> <li>A proven track record of supporting complex, cross-functional programs.</li> <li>Expertise in social media listening and support tools, with the ability to create clear reporting, actionable insights, and effective escalation paths.</li> <li>Experience working with online communities and a strong understanding of how to align on requirements with other operational teams.</li> <li>A comprehensive understanding of internal escalations, crisis management and customer experience principles.</li> <li>The ability to thrive in a dynamic, high-growth environment and drive results.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

opportunities.roleTitle: Consumer Products and Experience Operations Manager - Korea
requiredQualifications: Players form the foundation of our community and it’s for them that we continue to evolve and improve the <em>League of Legends</em> experience.</p> <p>We’re looking for humble but ambitious, razor-sharp professionals who can teach us a thing or two.

We embrace those who see things differently, aren’t afraid to experiment, and who have a healthy disregard for constraints.</p> <p>That's where you come in.</p> <p>As a <strong>CPX (Consumer Products and Experience) Operations Manager - Korea</strong>, you will own and scale Riot Games Korea’s CPX operational engine while helping shape the short- and long-term strategy for direct-to-consumer (DTC) business and experiential growth.

This role blends hands-on execution with strategic ownership and is designed for someone who can both “run the business” and continuously improve how the business operates.</p> <p>You will need to operate with autonomy, manage critical partners and budgets, and work seamlessly with Riot’s game and esports teams to deliver CPX initiatives tied to key milestone moments that directly impact CPX growth and sustainability in Korea.</p> <p>As a Rioter in Seoul, you’ll join a tight knit group of exceptionally bright minded individuals who share our prioritization of player experience, rejection of convention, and passion for gaming.

Riot Games Korea is dedicated to creating tailored player experiences that show local players they aren’t lost in translation.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Develop and execute short-and-long-term operational strategies to support scalable DTP growth</li> <li>Own end-to-end CPX operations across DTC retail, e-commerce, and live activations, including supply chain, agencies, logistics, and operational communication</li> <li>Lead CPX fiscal management in Korea, including budget planning, forecasting, and cost optimization</li> <li>Drive operational readiness for major launches and seasonal moments across Riot franchises and esports</li> <li>Drive pivotal CPX projects end-to-end, from planning through execution and post-mortem analysis</li> <li>Identify structural gaps and proactively improve operating models, processes, and governance</li> <li>Serve as a key point of operational decision-making for CPX Korea by partnering closely with regional and global stakeholders to align priorities, timelines, and execution standards</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>4+ years of experience in operations, strategy & operations, retail management, or related roles</li> <li>Proven experience owning projects, budgets, and cross-functional execution</li> <li>Strong analytical and planning skills with the ability to translate strategy into action</li> <li>Ability to work effectively across diverse teams and functions, align stakeholders toward shared goals, and operate independently while influencing without formal authority</li> <li>Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills in Korean and English</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience scaling DTC businesses in complex environments</li> <li>Background in supply chain management and domestic and international logistics</li> <li>Experience managing both internal teams and external agencies</li> <li>Comfort navigating ambiguity and building structure where none exists</li> <li>Experience in consumer products, lifestyle, entertainment, or fandom-related industries</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.

In this role, you’ll also oversee budgeting and resource allocation to support the successful execution of regional goals.</p> <p>As a Rioter in Seoul, you’ll join a tight knit group of exceptionally bright minded individuals who share our prioritization of player experience, rejection of convention, and passion for gaming.

As the product scales, build and lead a high-performing regional team.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree in marketing, business administration, or comparable work experience.</li> <li>8+ years of experience in game publishing or a similar field, with a focus on leading regional or subregional teams to deliver on product, marketing, and ecosystem goals.</li> <li>Proven experience in managing regional budgets, including allocating resources effectively and tracking financial performance.</li> <li>Significant experience in launching or scaling game products or services across different regions or markets.</li> <li>Extensive experience working in a global video game or entertainment company, with a strong understanding of the player base and community.</li> <li>Deep understanding of cultural nuances and regional market trends, with the ability to advocate for local needs in global decision-making.</li> <li>Proven ability to manage multiple complex projects or initiatives simultaneously, ensuring alignment with global goals, timelines, and budget constraints.</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Advanced degree (MBA or equivalent) in business, marketing, or a related field.</li> <li>Multilingual capabilities relevant to the subregions, enhancing communication with local stakeholders and partners.</li> <li>Strong analytical skills, with the ability to interpret complex data and translate it into actionable strategies for publishing and community engagement.</li> <li>Proven success working in a matrixed environment, managing cross-functional teams across various geographies.</li> <li>5+ years of experience in management roles within gaming, sports, or media industries.</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.
We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games.

requiredQualifications: Players form the foundation of our community and it’s for them that we continue to evolve and improve the <em>League of Legends</em> experience.</p> <p>We’re looking for humble but ambitious, razor-sharp professionals who can teach us a thing or two.

This is a hands-on production role for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and passionate about helping teams ship polished player-facing content.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Support the review of ported monetization assets from VALORANT PC to VALORANT Mobile, including weapon skins, accessories, and other monetization assets.</li> <li>Compare mobile asset implementation against PC references and help identify gaps in visual fidelity, authenticity, presentation quality, and overall player-facing experience.</li> <li>Document asset review feedback clearly and track follow-up items with relevant stakeholders until issues are resolved or decisions are aligned.</li> <li>Maintain clean and up-to-date documentation for each patch, including asset lists, review status, key decisions, risks, dependencies, and delivery progress.</li> <li>Coordinate meetings, reviews, feedback loops, and follow-up actions across Riot and co-development partners.</li> <li>Support the setup and iteration of review processes for future monetization SKUs, helping the team define clearer checkpoints, responsibilities, documentation standards, and approval flows.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>2+ years of experience in game production, project coordination, game operations, product operations, QA, art coordination, or a related role.</li> <li>Experience supporting the delivery of game content, features, assets, or live service updates.</li> <li>Strong attention to detail, especially when reviewing visual assets, implementation quality, or version documentation.</li> <li>Strong organizational skills, with the ability to maintain clear trackers, documentation, meeting notes, and follow-up action items.</li> <li>Good communication skills and the ability to coordinate effectively across Product, Art, Publishing, QA, and external or co-development teams.</li> <li>Ability to manage multiple asset reviews, tasks, and stakeholders at the same time while keeping progress visible and actionable.</li> <li>Comfortable working in a fast-moving development environment with changing priorities and incomplete information.</li> <li>Experience with documentation and tracking tools such as Jira, Confluence, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets, or similar tools.</li> <li>Fluent in Mandarin, with working proficiency in English for reading references, writing documentation, and participating in cross-team communication.</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience working on premium content, cosmetics, skins, accessories, or monetization-related content for a live service game.</li> <li>Familiarity with VALORANT’s visual identity, weapon skins, accessories, cosmetics culture, and player quality expectations.</li> <li>Experience comparing asset implementation across platforms, such as PC-to-Mobile, console-to-mobile, or regional version adaptation.</li> <li>Experience working with artists, technical artists, or asset pipelines.</li> <li>Prior experience working with external studios, co-development partners, or distributed teams.</li> <li>Passion for tactical shooters, competitive games, or mobile games.</li> </ul> <div class="widget__wrapper widget__wrapper--jobdescription js-widget js-widget--desktop visible--desktop js-widget--tablet visible--tablet <div class="job-description"> <div class="copy copy--large prose"> <div> <p>Employment Type: employment contract with FESCO Adecco, a professional personnel company in China.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="widget__wrapper widget__wrapper--applyform js-widget js-widget--desktop visible--desktop js-widget--tablet visible--tablet js-widget--mobile visible--mobile" data-widget-id="0dcedb73cedf52cf9ca25cf878d5b30e"> <div class="widget widget--spacing-small"> <div class="content-gutter content-center content-center--6-12"> <div class="js-apply-form-wrapper" data-props="{"jobId":"7695533","jobBoard":"riotgames"}"> <div class="apply-form"> <h2><strong>职位介绍</strong></h2> <p>作为支持 VALORANT Mobile 商业化方向的制作人，你将协助团队交付高质量的商业化内容，并维护 Riot、联合研发伙伴与发行团队之间顺畅、高效的协作流程。</p> <p>这个职位主要聚焦于商业化资产与流程的制作支持，包括 PC 到 Mobile 的资产移植审核、版本文档整理，以及未来新商业化 SKU 审核流程的搭建与跑通。你将协助团队确保武器皮肤、挂饰、卡面、喷漆等商业化资产在移动端能够尽可能忠实还原 PC 版本，同时符合 VALORANT 的质量标准与玩家期待。</p> <p>你将与产品经理、美术、制作人、联合研发伙伴和发行团队密切合作，追踪资产状态、整理文档、发现问题，并帮助团队更清晰地做出判断与推进决策。这个职位适合细心、有条理、执行力强，并且愿意帮助团队交付精致玩家体验的人。</p> <h2><strong>职责描述</strong></h2> <ul> <li>支持 VALORANT PC 到 VALORANT Mobile 的商业化资产移植审核，包括武器皮肤、挂饰、卡面、喷漆以及其他商业化相关资产。</li> <li>对照 PC 版本参考，检查移动端资产实现是否存在视觉还原度、真实性、展示效果或玩家体验上的差异。</li> <li>清晰记录资产审核反馈，并与相关团队持续追踪后续修正项，直到问题被解决或团队完成决策对齐。</li> <li>整理版本级别的商业化文档，帮助产品、美术、发行与联合研发团队更高效地协作。</li> <li>协调 Riot 与联合研发伙伴之间的会议、评审、反馈循环和后续行动项。</li> <li>支持未来新商业化 SKU 审核流程的建立与优化，协助团队定义更清晰的审核节点、责任分工、文档标准和审批流程。</li> </ul> <h2><strong>基本要求</strong></h2> <ul> <li>拥有 2 年以上游戏制作、项目协调、游戏运营、产品运营、QA、美术协调或相关岗位经验。</li> <li>有支持游戏内容、功能、资产或长线运营版本交付的经验。</li> <li>具备良好的细节敏感度，尤其是在视觉资产审核、实现质量检查或版本文档整理方面。</li> <li>具备优秀的组织能力，能够维护清晰的进度表、文档、会议记录和后续行动项。</li> <li>具备良好的沟通能力，能够与产品、美术、发行、QA 以及外部或联合研发团队高效协作。</li> <li>能够同时管理多个资产审核、任务和相关方，并让整体进度保持清晰、可见、可执行。</li> <li>能够适应节奏较快、优先级变化较多、信息不完全明确的研发环境。</li> <li>熟悉 Jira、Confluence、Airtable、Notion、Google Sheets 或类似文档与项目追踪工具。</li> <li>中文流利，具备可用于阅读参考资料、撰写文档和参与跨团队沟通的英文能力。</li> </ul> <h2><strong>加分项</strong></h2> <ul> <li>有长线运营游戏中的商业化内容、皮肤、外观、饰品或付费内容相关经验。</li> <li>熟悉 VALORANT 的视觉风格、武器皮肤、饰品体系、外观文化和玩家质量期待。</li> <li>有跨平台资产实现审核经验，例如 PC 到 Mobile、主机到移动端，或不同区域版本之间的适配。</li> <li>有与美术、技术美术或资产管线团队协作的经验。</li> <li>有与外部工作室、联合研发伙伴或分布式团队合作的经验。</li> <li>热爱战术射击、竞技游戏或移动游戏。</li> </ul> <p>用工性质：与专业人事服务公司FESCO Adecco签订劳动合同.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div>

requiredQualifications: We are honored to serve over 100 million players worldwide every month. </p> <p>The Product Management, Publishing discipline partners closely with product and publishing leaders to bring forward analyses, recommendations, solutions, products and strategies that address complex player experience and business issues to achieve the best outcomes for players,  such as drive initiatives for CN in-game event planning, channels collaboration, monetization, and around game features.

You will get deeply involved in every aspect of our game’s business operations and revenue management, designing and delivering in-game events pipelines that Chinese players love, exploring new monetization strategies that enhance player experience, or exploring new around-game experiences for players to access the contents that they love. </p> <p>As a <strong>Product Manager, TFT</strong>, you will report directly to the TFT & FFGS China Publishing Product Lead and contribute to strategy development and execution for TFT player growth, engagement, monetization, and esports initiatives in China.</p> <p>You will work closely with global teams and publishing partners to shape strategies and recommendations that serve Chinese players.

You'll help conceptualize, influence and execute together with our regional teams and across teams at Riot. </p> <h2>Responsibilities: </h2> <ul> <li>Partner with TFT dev team and Tencent product team to organize their efforts - accounting for delivery timelines, ensure product quality, revenue impacts, and opportunity costs</li> <li>Support TFT China operations by helping develop publishing plans, player journey improvements, engagement initiatives, and operational opportunities.</li> <li>Support TFT franchise esports strategy by identifying opportunities to strengthen player participation, viewership, and publishing integration.</li> <li>Build, report, and maintain business health metrics across engagement, monetization, player sentiment, and market performance.</li> <li>Conduct market analysis, business projections, impact assessments, and opportunity evaluations to support decision making.</li> <li>Present business insights, product outcomes, and recommendations to stakeholders across Riot, Tencent, and partner teams.</li> <li>Explore new around-game product opportunities, publishing experiences, and monetization strategies that enhance the local player experience.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications: </h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree and 5+ years of professional experience in product management, publishing operations, in-game experience.

PC and strategy game experience preferred.</li> <li>Experience with microtransactions and game monetization, either through design or personal experience.</li> <li>Experience building structured strategies, business cases, projections, and decision-making frameworks for product, publishing, or business opportunities.</li> <li>Strong understanding of the China gaming market, including player behavior, content trends, monetization preferences, competitive landscape, and platform / channel dynamics.</li> <li>Fluent in Chinese and English, and can drive collaboration across language and culture </li> <li>Willingness to travel frequently </li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications: </h2> <ul> <li>Experience in product management, business operation, ecommerce, consulting, or business strategy for consumer-facing products</li> <li>Advanced degrees in Economics, Finance, Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, Statistics, Management Information Systems, a related discipline, or comparable work experiences</li> <li>Experienced stakeholder management and rapport-building skills</li> <li>Experience driving projects from planning through launch, measurement, and iteration.</li> <li>Strong communication and storytelling skills, especially when translating complex business, player, or market insights into clear recommendations for senior stakeholders.</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.
preferredQualifications: We are honored to serve over 100 million players worldwide every month. </p> <p>The Product Management, Publishing discipline partners closely with product and publishing leaders to bring forward analyses, recommendations, solutions, products and strategies that address complex player experience and business issues to achieve the best outcomes for players,  such as drive initiatives for CN in-game event planning, channels collaboration, monetization, and around game features.

You will get deeply involved in every aspect of our game’s business operations and revenue management, designing and delivering in-game events pipelines that Chinese players love, exploring new monetization strategies that enhance player experience, or exploring new around-game experiences for players to access the contents that they love. </p> <p>As a <strong>Product Manager, TFT</strong>, you will report directly to the TFT & FFGS China Publishing Product Lead and contribute to strategy development and execution for TFT player growth, engagement, monetization, and esports initiatives in China.</p> <p>You will work closely with global teams and publishing partners to shape strategies and recommendations that serve Chinese players.

You'll help conceptualize, influence and execute together with our regional teams and across teams at Riot. </p> <h2>Responsibilities: </h2> <ul> <li>Partner with TFT dev team and Tencent product team to organize their efforts - accounting for delivery timelines, ensure product quality, revenue impacts, and opportunity costs</li> <li>Support TFT China operations by helping develop publishing plans, player journey improvements, engagement initiatives, and operational opportunities.</li> <li>Support TFT franchise esports strategy by identifying opportunities to strengthen player participation, viewership, and publishing integration.</li> <li>Build, report, and maintain business health metrics across engagement, monetization, player sentiment, and market performance.</li> <li>Conduct market analysis, business projections, impact assessments, and opportunity evaluations to support decision making.</li> <li>Present business insights, product outcomes, and recommendations to stakeholders across Riot, Tencent, and partner teams.</li> <li>Explore new around-game product opportunities, publishing experiences, and monetization strategies that enhance the local player experience.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications: </h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree and 5+ years of professional experience in product management, publishing operations, in-game experience.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>The Trust and Safety Operations team is focused (ok, maybe obsessed) on scaling Roblox’s Operations organization and transforming our customer experience through our multi-year vision and strategy execution. </p> <p>You will be reporting to the Trust & Safety India Operations Manager.

You will coordinate across multiple teams to ensure rapid response to minimize the impact on customers and business operations, identifying trends, enhancing support processes, improving agent efficiency, and reducing operational costs while maintaining high reliability and service quality.</p> <p>Additionally, you will serve as a product expert working closely with the PSM team, providing detailed synthesis of new and existing issues our users experience to prioritize and enable engineering teams to improve the platform. </p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Coordinate and lead incident response activities for critical and high-severity issues, assemble and manage incident response teams, including representatives from Engineering, Product, and other relevant teams along with assessing incident impact and determining severity levels.</li> <li>Take ownership of technical escalations and high-priority incidents related to Roblox Trust & Safety Global Scaled Operations, customers, internal escalations, and high priority BPO agent escalations.</li> <li>Proactively identify opportunities to improve support processes, enhance agent efficiency, reduce operating costs, and improve overall customer satisfaction.</li> <li>Collaborate with Knowledge Management and Training teams to develop and maintain documentation, training materials, and best practices based on issue trends and resolutions.</li> <li>Work with Quality Assurance teams to ensure process adherence, identify areas for improvement in support workflows, and implement quality control measures.</li> <li>Contribute to the successful launch of new support streams and initiatives by providing subject matter expertise and process guidance.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience in a technical support, product support, or related role.

Experience in leveraging SQL or Python to problem solve and dashboard can be a plus.</li> <li>Strong understanding of customer support principles, methodologies, and best practices.</li> <li>Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and troubleshooting skills, with the ability to diagnose and resolve complex technical issues.</li> <li>Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to convey technical information clearly and concisely to diverse audiences.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, build relationships, and influence stakeholders.</li> <li>Experience with data analysis, reporting, and identifying trends to drive process improvements.</li> <li>Familiarity with support ticketing systems, CRM tools, and other relevant support technologies.</li> <li>Must be willing to participate in on-call support for incident management issues.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Innovative: </strong>You proactively identify emerging risks and execute on out of the box ideas to achieve goals.</li> <li><strong>Analytical:</strong> Excited to investigate large, ambiguous problems, and measure the problems and the solutions.</li> <li><strong>Proactive Problem Solver</strong>: You anticipate potential problems and take proactive and decisive action to solve them.</li> <li><strong>Team-oriented: </strong>You lift up your peers and find ways to make the team stronger.</li> <li><strong>Data-Driven</strong>: Uses data to identify trends, measure results, and drive decision-making</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>This training program is designed to provide a transitioning service member with a comprehensive, hands-on experience in a civilian Security Operations Center.

The program will leverage the fellow’s existing military cybersecurity knowledge and translate it to commercial tools, processes, and a corporate environment.</p> <p>The goal is for the fellow to become a qualified Tier 2 SOC Analyst or Information Security Engineer, capable of in-depth incident investigation, threat hunting, and contributing to overall security posture of the organization and the workforce.</p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Support Security Incidents, ensuring that any serious threats and impacts are understood, mitigated and learnt from with speed and professionalism</li> <li>Conduct Investigations, digging into the context of situations and determining if a threat exists and taking action to prevent it</li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with information security, legal, human resources, executive teams, external (developers & customers) and the security community</li> <li>Work collaboratively with other teams in security and engineering to support (and sometimes lead) high profile events or responses to vulnerabilities</li> <li>Produce Security response procedures including, runbooks, IRPs, workflows and automations, as well as internal briefings</li> <li>Threat Hunt for anomalous activity in our signals, determine if these outliers are threats or expected behavior</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>In alignment with the <a href="https://skillbridge.osd.mil/program-overview.htm">SkillBridge </a>program, candidates must meet the following criteria: <ul> <li>Have served at least 180 continuous days of active duty</li> <li>Are within 180 days of separation or retirement from military service</li> <li>Will receive an honorable discharge</li> <li>Have completed the <a href="https://www.tapevents.mil/">Transition Assistance Program (TAP) </a></li> <li>Additionally, written permission from the unit commander is needed before your start date.</li> </ul> </li> <li>A detailed thinker who enjoys exploring and collecting the details and considering how they impact what you’re doing</li> <li>An eager problem solver who is drawn to issues rather than avoidant of it</li> <li>A team player who enjoys winning as a team member and holds yourself to a high standard to enable the group</li> <li>Compelled by our mission to protect Roblox’s users from harm and protect the safe space we’ve created</li> </ul> <p>During SkillBridge participation, Service members continue to receive military compensation and remain covered by their military benefits. <a class="c-link" href="https://www.doi.gov/veterans/skillbridge#:~:text=During%20SkillBridge%20participation%2C%20Service%20members,into%20any%20agreement%20with%20DOI." target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.doi.gov/veterans/skillbridge#:~:text=During%20SkillBridge%20participation%2C%20Service%20members,into%20any%20agreement%20with%20DOI." data-sk="tooltip_parent">You can find more information here</a>.</p> <p>You may redact age, date of birth, and dates of attendance/graduation from your resume if you prefer.</p> <div id="message-list_bottomSpacer" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="bottomSpacer"></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

opportunities.roleTitle: Social Media and Content Ops Director
requiredQualifications: Whether it’s building award-winning games or crafting engine technology that enables others to make visually stunning interactive experiences, we’re always innovating.</p> <p>Being Epic means being a part of a team that continually strives to do right by our community and users.

We’re constantly innovating to raise the bar of engine and game development.</p></div><h2>PUBLISHING</h2> <h3><strong>What We Do</strong></h3> <p>We deliver the most innovative gaming experiences possible to players around the world.

Whether through community outreach, world-class events, or partnership integrations, the Epic Games Publishing and Marketing teams seek to surprise players with new experiences every time they drop in to play.</p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <p>We’re seeking a Social Media and Content Ops Director to help lead the strategy, innovation, and global growth of Fortnite’s social media ecosystem.

You’ll partner closely with Marketing, Communications, Community Development, Creative/Brand, Product Management, eSports, Creative Development, and Game Development teams to ensure our social storytelling reflects the spirit of Epic and resonates with audiences around the world.</p> <h3><strong>In this role, you will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Partner with executive leadership to translate company priorities into breakthrough social storytelling and audience engagement strategies</li> <li>Drive innovation in content formats and platform strategies, championing a culture of experimentation that empowers teams to explore new approaches to creator partnerships, live content, and community interaction—ensuring Fortnite’s presence stays ahead of evolving trends and emerging technologies</li> <li>Have a strong operational focus with peers in Marketing and Publishing Production to drive authentic appointment setting around key Fortnite beats</li> <li>Integrate data and insights into creative decision-making to ensure storytelling and engagement efforts are both impactful and measurable, while proactively tracking and evaluating outcomes</li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with paid media, influencer, and communications teams to orchestrate cohesive campaign ecosystems and to guide platform relationships with key partners (e.g., TikTok, YouTube, Meta, X, Reddit, Twitch) to drive innovation and co-marketing opportunities</li> <li>Advocating for audience-first thinking and authentic brand connection, and oversee governance, tone, and consistency of Fortnite’s brand voice across all game modes and global regions</li> <li>Aggressively analyze metrics on social content performance, with quick iteration and feedback cycles to inform how to improve subsequent campaigns</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What we're looking for</strong></h3> <ul> <li>7-10+ years of experience in social media and/or digital content, with at least 3-5 years managing large-scale global programs</li> <li>Background in the Gaming industry (especially in Live Service Games) or adjacent Tech/Entertainment industry</li> <li>Proven track record building and executing global social strategies for major entertainment, gaming, or consumer brands</li> <li>Deep understanding of platform ecosystems, audience behavior, and emerging media formats</li> <li>Experience mentoring high-performing teams across creative, strategy, and analytics functions</li> <li>Strong creative instincts paired with data-driven judgment—you inspire bold ideas and know how to measure their impact</li> <li>Experience collaborating at the executive level, influencing company-wide marketing and communications priorities</li> <li>Global perspective and cultural fluency; experience developing content strategies for diverse, international audiences</li> <li>Proficiency with social management and analytics tools (Sprout, Emplifi, Radarly, ListenFirst, etc.)</li> </ul> <p><strong>This role is open to multiple locations across the US (including CA, NYC, & WA).

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>At Roblox, we believe that careers are dynamic and should be a continuous progression through challenges and opportunities that build new skills and strengths.</p> <p>As part of our commitment to fostering growth and development, we encourage you to learn more about this opportunity and apply if you see a potential fit!</p> <p>As Counsel for the Americas on the Regulatory & International Legal team, you will advise business and legal teams on existing and emerging online safety, AI, and consumer laws in the Americas, and support regulatory engagement activities.</p> <p>This role reports to the Head of Americas, Regulatory & International Legal.

This is an opportunity to join a growing legal team, learn about exciting new technologies and business models, and work on novel legal issues.</p> <p> </p> <p>You will:</p> <ul> <li>Evaluate and advise on existing, pending, and developing regulations in the Americas, with a focus on online safety, AI, and consumer laws;</li> <li>Develop and implement compliance strategies;</li> <li>Identify and educate colleagues on new legislative and regulatory trends affecting Roblox in region;</li> <li>Respond to requests for advice from cross-functional teams as needed; and</li> <li>Support regulatory engagement activities.</li> </ul> <p> </p> <p>You have:</p> <ul> <li>5-7 years of relevant legal experience;</li> <li>License to practice law in a US jurisdiction;</li> <li>Experience working with or for a company or companies in the social media, content or gaming space;</li> <li>Experience tracking and analyzing state and federal legislative proposals;</li> <li>Experience dealing with online safety, consumer or other relevant regulators;</li> <li>Knowledge of, or interest in, regulatory landscape in the Americas (including but not limited to the US); </li> <li>Strong critical judgment and analytical skills with the ability to propose solutions and translate your legal analysis into practical advice, taking into account the needs and objectives of the business; </li> <li>Excellent organizational and prioritization skills;</li> <li>The ability to work independently and effectively in a remote environment; </li> <li>The ability to handle a diverse and complex workload; and</li> <li>The ability to work collaboratively within a small, tightly-knit team.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>For roles that are based at our headquarters in San Mateo, CA: The starting base pay for this position is as shown below.
The actual base pay is dependent upon a variety of job-related factors such as professional background, training, work experience, location, business needs and market demand.

requiredQualifications: Whether it’s building award-winning games or crafting engine technology that enables others to make visually stunning interactive experiences, we’re always innovating.</p> <p>Being Epic means being a part of a team that continually strives to do right by our community and users.

In this role, you will work closely with artists, designers, and other programmers on cutting-edge features that support player experiences across Fortnite.</p> <h3><strong>In this role, you will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Contribute to the design and implementation of new and existing UI and its intersections with gameplay features and services</li> <li><span>Optimize and fix bugs in existing systems </span></li> <li><span>Build relationships with adjacent teams including Art, Design, Product, and Performance, while working on cutting edge features that support player experiences across the Fortnite ecosystem </span></li> <li><span>Collaborate effectively with peers, share knowledge, and support others’ success as well as your own </span></li> <li><span>Write and document reliable, maintainable code, with extensibility in mind </span></li> <li><span>Maintain strong attention to detail, especially with regard to functionality, readability and compliance </span></li> </ul> <h3><strong>What we're looking for</strong></h3> <ul> <li><span>Strong understanding of C++ and technical fundamentals </span></li> <li><span>Experience developing UI features for console (direct mobile experience or knowledge is a plus) </span></li> <li><span>A commitment to delivering quality work with a collaborative, solutions-focused approach, and a willingness to explore and learn unfamiliar systems </span></li> <li><span>Ability to communicate clearly and respectfully in a remote, cross-disciplinary team environment </span></li> <li><span>An interest in games or interactive experiences, and UI/UX design principles </span></li> <li><span>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills </span></li> <li><span>UMG and Slate experience is a plus </span></li> </ul> <h2>EPIC JOB + EPIC BENEFITS = EPIC LIFE</h2> <p>We pay 100% for benefits for both employees (EEs) and dependents (deps).

opportunities.roleTitle: Manager, VFX Art - Unpublished R&D Product
requiredQualifications: You will report into the Associate Art Director of the team.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Lead, mentor, and grow the VFX craft in Singapore, ensuring it serves as a center of excellence for delivering feedback, aligning with partner studios, and upholding Riot’s quality bar.</li> <li>Own the full lifecycle management of VFX team members—from selection and onboarding through performance development, feedback, and exits where necessary—ensuring the right people and skills are in place to deliver at Riot’s quality bar.</li> <li>Set clear performance expectations for VFX staff and partner teams, providing regular feedback and managing performance effectively and empathetically.</li> <li>Provide clear, actionable feedback to partner studios to ensure all VFX work meets the project’s bar for readability and clarity.</li> <li>Partner closely with studios throughout the production process—from kickoff through delivery—to ensure alignment on creative direction, technical quality, and schedule.</li> <li>Build strong relationships with partner studios, creating an environment of trust, transparency, and shared pursuit of craft Leveraging your expertise in character art production, communication, and real-time game development pipelines, you’ll guide external teams through documentation, reference gathering, feedback, and final asset integration while helping push the quality and consistency of memorable player experiences.

Reporting to the individual art lead(s) and partnering closely with Outsource Management, you will serve as the front-line creative reviewer for outsourced character content and help maintain quality throughout production.</p> <h3><strong>In this role, you will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Work closely with Epic Art Leads, Outsource Managers, and internal artists to ensure external partners have all the external development teams</span></li> <li><span>Create or support asset blockouts, paintovers, and example assets to help communicate creative direction and production expectations </span></li> assets for visual quality, technical accuracy, optimization, and gameplay readiness before final integration</span></li> <li><span>Work cross-functionally with internal Epic art teams to ensure outsourced assets are correctly integrated into the pipeline and engine </span></li> <li><span>Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to outsourced art assets, including bug support, triage, and follow-through to completion </span></li> <li><span>When needed, contribute hands-on character art production work while maintaining familiarity with Epic pipelines, workflows, and production standards </span></li> <li><span>Help identify pipeline improvements and opportunities to improve communication, efficiency, and quality across external development partnerships </span></li> </ul> <h3><strong>What we're looking for</strong></h3> <ul> <li><span>Experience shipping AAA titles across multiple platforms</span></li> <li><span>Strong experience creating and reviewing high-quality 3D character assets for games</span></li> <li><span>Experience working with external vendors and outsourcing pipelines in a production environment</span></li> <li><span>Strong understanding of real-time game art pipelines, character creation workflows, optimization, and engine integration</span></li> <li><span>Proficiency with industry-standard art tools, including Maya, 3ds Max, ZBrush, Photoshop, Substance Painter/Designer, and related software</span></li> <li><span>Excellent communication and organizational skills, with the ability to deliver clear and actionable creative feedback across distributed external teams</span></li> <li><span>Ability to balance artistic quality with technical requirements and production timelines</span></li> <li><span>Self-motivated, highly collaborative, detail-oriented, and solutions-focused</span></li> <li><span>Experience working in fast-paced development environments with evolving priorities</span></li> <li><span>Passion for games, character art, and creating memorable player experiences</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>This role is open to multiple locations across the US (including CA, NYC, & WA).

You will play a critical role in driving future gameplay features and leading other programmers in the process.</p> <h3><strong>In this role, you will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Work closely with art and design on a variety of gameplay features</li> <li>Prototype and iterate, and be willing to accept and respond to critical feedback</li> <li>Collaborate with other programmers on technical approaches to satisfy both the surface-level and deeper, programming-specific requirements</li> <li>Optimize and fix bugs in existing gameplay systems to ensure high-quality user experiences across all platforms we support</li> <li>Write robust, maintainable code</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What we're looking for</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience developing games professionally and shipping AAA titles</li> <li>An analytical mind with strong problem-solving skills</li> <li>Strong C++ skills and the ability to code and design gameplay mechanics and tools</li> <li>Well-versed in games and the ability to articulate what is strong/weak about the design of existing games</li> <li>Experience with or desire to work in a live game environment</li> <li>Self-motivated, strong work ethic, and able to work independently</li> <li>Creativity in problem-solving and the ability to think outside of the established solutions</li> <li>Experience writing multiplayer gameplay systems is a plus</li> <li>Keen interest in games</li> </ul> <h2>EPIC JOB + EPIC BENEFITS = EPIC LIFE</h2> <p>We pay 100% for benefits for both employees and dependents and offer coverage for supplemental medical, dental, vision, critical illness, telemedicine, Life and AD&D, long term disability insurance as well as weekly indemnity (short term disability) and a retirement savings plan with a competitive employer match.

opportunities.roleTitle: Esports Competitive Operations - Rules & Compliance Analyst II, EMEA
requiredQualifications: You will work closely with the regional and global Competitive Operations teams to develop our strategy and tactics for handling complex disciplinary investigations, lead our day to day efforts administering discipline across our esports in the territory, and execute integrity-related programs.</p> <h2>Responsibilities: </h2> <ul> <li>Lead discipline and rules enforcement for our professional and semi-professional ecosystems across our multiple esports in the EMEA territory</li> <li>Partner with the Global Head of Rules and Compliance, esports, to level up our existing rulesets, develop new policies and practices to position Riot at the forefront of discipline within esports / sports</li> <li>Provide best practices to our various partnered tournament organizers and the wider EMEA competitive operations team</li> <li>Audit the rulesets of sub-regions within the EMEA territories to ensure their compliance with Global regulations</li> <li>Drive alignment locally and globally to ensure consistency in enforcement and discipline across our different esports</li> <li>Collaborate with the Legal team on compliance issues that arise with our esports across the EMEA territory</li> <li>Design and execute strategy for effective prevention and education programs within the EMEA territory</li> <li>Develop and execute a strategy for managing and engaging with third party government bodies and regulators within the EMEA territory</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s Law Degree degree or experience in the legal field</li> <li>3+ years of proven working experience in the legal or administrative field ( for e.g., as a paralegal, preferably in courts, arbitration and/or sports organization) </li> <li>Highly organized and strong administrative skills</li> <li>Critical and analytical thinking</li> <li>Ability to work independently </li> <li>Reading comprehension, written and oral communication along with attention to details are critical skills</li> <li>Excellent written and oral English proficiency</li> <li>Expert proficiency with Google Suite  (Google Docs, Google Slides & Google Sheets)</li> <li>Authorized to work in Germany</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications: </h2> <ul> <li>Experience in dealing with disciplinary or integrity matters within sports or esports</li> <li>Experience working within an international environment</li> <li>Knowledge of the esports ecosystem in general as well as the EMEA esports ecosystem</li> <li>Proficiency in another language beyond English, such as Spanish, German, French, Arabic, or Turkish</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.  We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games.
Whether you’re working directly on a new player-facing experience or you’re supporting the company as a whole, everyone at Riot is part of our mission.

opportunities.roleTitle: Manager,  Quality Assurance - League of Legends
requiredQualifications: Riot has been expanding our footprint in Asia and accelerating our talent growth to develop games that deliver great experiences to our players.

The Singapore Studio is seeking talented, passionate craft experts with backgrounds in all areas of game development to build games that make it better to be a player. </p> <p>That's where you come in.</p> <p>For League of Legends, the <strong>Manager, QA</strong> will lead a team of 5 QA professionals working alongside software engineers, content developers, artists, project managers, and producers to create value for players around the world.

You will also partner with your team and fellow craft leaders to improve delivery and create more efficient solutions to everyday challenges, while coordinating additional QA support, often across remote teams, to ensure work is completed effectively.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li><strong>Impact/Scope and Complexity</strong> <ul> <li>Shape QA strategy for League of Legends and directly influence development quality across the game</li> <li>Be accountable for delivering a comprehensive quality strategy across your team</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Ownership</strong> <ul> <li>Be responsible for the results and delivery quality of QA professionals across your sphere of influence</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Management</strong> <ul> <li>You directly manage the QA professionals on your initiative/teams in addition to guiding their day to day work.</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Craft Knowledge</strong> <ul> <li>Bring broad quality assurance knowledge within game development and understand how QA approaches support team goals</li> <li>Partner across disciplines to influence testing practices, quality decisions, and player experience outcomes</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>5+ years of Quality Assurance experience within game development environments - you have supported & shipped games</li> <li>2+ years leading QA teams within game development, including direct people management, performance management, and HR responsibility</li> <li>Experience leading <span style="text-decoration: underline;">embedded</span> QA professionals as part of cross functional development teams rather than outsourced QA functions</li> <li>Experience creating and driving test strategies for (live) games, game features, or live service environments</li> <li>Experience managing and aligning with HQ stakeholders remotely across multiple time zones</li> <li>Experience with game development pipelines and workflows, with art pipeline experience strongly preferred</li> <li>Experience setting strategic goals and driving execution across QA teams</li> <li>Experience establishing and tracking quality metrics that influence development decisions and drive improvements</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Familiarity with League of Legends, the game, the champions, its players and community</li> <li>I/ASTQB Advanced Test Manager Certification</li> </ul> <h2>Our Perks:</h2> <ul> <li>Full relocation support</li> <li>Full health insurance for you, your spouse and children</li> <li>Open paid time off</li> <li>Retirement benefits with company matching</li> <li>Life insurance, parental leave, plus short-term and long-term disability</li> <li>Play Fund so you can broaden and deepen your knowledge of our players and community through games</li> <li>We will double down on your donations of time and money to non-profits</li> </ul> <p><strong>If you’re interested in both Manager, QA openings, we’d ask that you apply to the one that excites you most.

opportunities.roleTitle: Principal Researcher - League of Legends PubSports
requiredQualifications: We're an interdisciplinary group of scientists, consultants, and strategists from all sorts of backgrounds who join together to represent and advocate for gamers around the world.
We believe that illuminating the globally diverse experiences, behaviors, and needs of gamers is critical to Riot living up to our player-focused mission.
This role will conduct research using custom and survey methods to help inform data-driven strategies for improving player experiences.

This hybrid position blends onsite work in Santa Monica, CA with remote flexibility.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Design and execute end-to-end studies using a wide range of qualitative and quantitative methods to uncover player motivations, pain points, and emerging opportunity areas.</li> <li>Generate strategic insights that inform high impact publishing, esports, and additional out-of-game decisions for League ranging from positioning, to regional investment strategies and GTM planning. </li> <li>Work closely with League product teams to build cohesive insights about how out of game experiences impact players and what can be improved to enhance them.</li> <li>Communicate research findings through compelling narratives that align stakeholders and drive executive decision-making.</li> <li>Champion the player perspective by delivering evidence-based guidance on player needs, motivations, and behaviors, both current players and prospective League players.</li> <li>Collaborate closely with game teams, additional researchers, and Insights partners to develop and socialize research-driven frameworks that shape League’s product strategy and help to level up research capabilities at Riot.</li> <li>Advance strategic thinking and research framework development to support long-term innovation and player-focused development.</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications: </h2> <ul> <li>9+ years of relevant research experience (advanced degrees may substitute for up to 2 years).</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to conduct research that informs game product and portfolio strategy.</li> <li>Experienced in both qualitative and quantitative research methods - including in-depth-interviews, focus groups, playtests, diary studies, and surveys - with deep specialization in at least one.</li> <li>Skilled at synthesizing research findings into clear, actionable insights for product leadership.</li> <li>Excellent communication and collaboration skills; able to influence across all levels of an organization.</li> <li>Experience joining research findings with analytics approaches to join out-of-game player understanding with behavioral patterns.</li> <li>Proven ability to independently lead complex, multi-stakeholder projects and cross-functional workstreams in collaboration with diverse partners.</li> <li>Experience managing external vendors in driving research/insights projects. </li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience working in gaming, entertainment, or live-service product marketing.</li> <li>Familiarity with League of Legends and in the PC PvP gaming space.</li> <li>Familiarity with distributed data processing frameworks (e.g., Spark).</li> <li>Exposure to global and regional marketing campaign planning and execution.</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise and a collaborative spirit that prioritizes the delight of players.

Using modern technologies, you will build and maintain a social ecosystem that ensures safe, civil, and meaningful interactions across diverse age groups.</p> <p>We are kind, highly collaborative, and draw on a mix of startup and large company backgrounds to iterate faster within Roblox.</p> <p>Our primary product is a <strong>platform-level Party System</strong>.

As the heartbeat of social interaction on Roblox, this system enables users to coordinate, form groups, and stay connected as they navigate across servers and immersive experiences.</p> <p>While we have a strong foundation of chat, voice, gameplay mechanics, and creator APIs, we need your expertise to strengthen our backend infrastructure, build out new features, and accelerate our path toward product-market fit.
