You will have opportunities to work on various initiatives, get hands-on with cutting-edge technologies, and work with talented internal and external teams, all while building impactful experiences from concept to delivery.</p> <h3><strong>In this role, you will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Envision, plan, refactor and implement new features with a systemic approach like hud widgets, hud markers, minimap, mission flow, activity feed, conversation/interaction menus and more</li> <li>Write robust, maintainable code with a focus on generic modularization and the future</li> <li>Optimize and fix bugs in new and legacy systems</li> <li>Integrate backend systems in support of the player experience</li> <li>Collaborate with the cross-disciplinary team on cutting-edge features that support player experiences in our game and potentially across the Fortnite ecosystem</li> <li>Work closely with backend developers to align on service and client goals</li> <li>Work closely with art and design leads to ensure that UI meets aesthetic and functional requirements</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What we're looking for</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Exceptional C++ programming skills</li> <li>Experience developing features for games across multiple platforms</li> <li>Significant experience developing online multiplayer games or other interactive real-time technology applications with a strong online component</li> <li>Interest in social, frontend, and gameplay-adjacent areas of game development</li> <li>Ability to empathize with users and to balance the inherent tradeoffs in developing with great user experiences in mind</li> <li>Keen analytical mind and mature problem-solving skills</li> <li>Strong teamwork and cross-discipline collaboration skills, including the ability to deliver and respond to constructive feedback</li> <li>Unreal Engine development experience preferred</li> </ul> <h2>EPIC JOB + EPIC BENEFITS = EPIC LIFE</h2> <p>We pay 100% for benefits for both employees and dependents and offer coverage for supplemental medical, dental, vision, critical illness, telemedicine, Life and AD&D, long term disability insurance as well as weekly indemnity (short term disability) and a retirement savings plan with a competitive employer match.

requiredQualifications: You will act as the senior publishing leader for your region, connecting product direction, marketing strategy, and esports delivery to create authentic and impactful experiences for players.</p> <p>You will be accountable for defining and executing publishing strategies that balance global consistency with local relevance, ensuring that each market’s cultural and competitive context is reflected in how we show up.

Your ability to connect insight‑driven strategy with high‑impact execution will be critical in growing VALORANT’s presence, deepening community connection, and delivering on both player and business outcomes.</p> <p>Reporting to the Publishing Manager DACH & Eastern Europe, the Brand Manager Eastern Europe will be based in Berlin (Germany).</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Develop and own a cohesive multi‑market publishing strategy for your region that delivers against global product goals and local player needs</li> <li>Translate global product priorities into tailored market plans that maximize player engagement and business impact</li> <li>Act as the primary publishing voice for your region in global product discussions, shaping product and publishing decisions with regional insight</li> <li>Lead integrated go‑to‑market plans that connect product beats, esports moments, creator activations, and cultural opportunities</li> <li>Oversee large‑scale budgets, making data‑driven investment decisions across multiple markets</li> <li>Build, guide, and align cross‑disciplinary teams across publishing, esports, community, creative, and commercial functions</li> <li>Track and assess performance across campaigns and markets, applying insights to continuously optimize strategy and execution</li> <li>Cultivate strong relationships with regional partners, media, agencies, and key influencers to amplify VALORANT’s impact across your cluster</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>7+ years in publishing, marketing, or product management, preferably in games, entertainment, or tech</li> <li>Proven experience leading high‑impact, multi‑market campaigns from strategic planning through to execution</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to influence product direction through market insight and player advocacy</li> <li>Strong leadership skills with experience managing cross‑functional and distributed teams</li> <li>Deep understanding of FPS gaming culture and the VALORANT player community</li> <li>Exceptional communication skills, fluent in Polish and English</li> <li>Strong budget ownership experience with a track record of maximizing ROI across multiple markets</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience driving publishing strategy for major game launches or sustained live service products across multiple countries</li> <li>Proven success integrating esports, live events, and cultural moments into holistic brand strategies</li> <li>Strong analytical and strategic planning skills, with the ability to translate complex insights into actionable publishing tactics</li> <li>Experience mentoring and developing other publishing professionals</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.  We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games.

If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role!</em></p> <h2>Our Perks:</h2> <p>We offer medical, dental, and vision plans that cover you, your spouse/domestic partner, and children.
Life insurance, parental leave, plus short-term and long-term disability coverage are also available.

opportunities.roleTitle: Manager, Technical Art - Unpublished R&D Product
requiredQualifications: You will partner with the Art Director to inform on best practices and pipelines, workflow, and asset production so artists can work efficiently and without technical hurdles in production.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>As a Technical Art Lead on the team, you will oversee and be accountable for the quality of the work the team delivers and set the bar for excellence. </li> <li>Provide technical direction for your team.</li> <li>Own the full lifecycle management of your team members—from selection and onboarding through performance development, feedback, and exits where necessary—ensuring the right people and skills are in place to deliver at Riot’s quality bar.</li> <li>You will establish and maintain a highly engaged, creative, and motivated workspace for your team to unleash people’s potential.</li> <li>You will lead teams in identifying new opportunities to incorporate technology to increase art workflow efficiency and unlock new creative opportunities</li> <li>You will lead and improve team rituals to support high-quality craft and individual growth</li> <li>You will accomplish your mission with complete autonomy if needed; you're dedicated to vigilantly finding creative and effective solutions to eliminate complex problems.</li> <li>Collaborate with the relevant discipline leads and production teams in Singapore and Los Angeles to maintain consistency in workflow, and quality expectations.</li> <li>Amplify the team’s artistic capabilities while maintaining efficient and sustainable memory and performance</li> <li>Ensure technical support to art and animation in both Maya and Motionbuilder across the product</li> <li>Prototype new products and build effective asset generation pipelines to support them</li> <li>Work with IT and other technical organizations across the company to ensure alignment and support for product</li> <li>Build close relationships with the artists and engineers you work alongside with to understand their needs and provide leadership on tool and pipeline development</li> <li>Partner with other Managers of Technical Art and Technical Art Directors of the unpublished R&D product to develop a cohesive vision and shared standards across the discipline</li> <li>Collaborate with our external partner studios to build and maintain the pipelines, tools and guidance they need to consistently deliver high quality assets</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>5+ years of professional experience as a technical artist in games or related industries</li> <li>Deep expertise in Character Rigging and deformation systems</li> <li>Strong proficiency in dynamics (cloth, hair, physics-based secondary motion)</li> <li>Proven experience leading/mentoring teams and individuals</li> <li>Experience with Maya and authoring Maya tools with Python/C++</li> <li>Experience developing games, prototypes or tools in Unreal using Python and Blueprints</li> <li>Past experience working with multiple source control tools such as git and perforce</li> <li>Experience with and commitment to building long-term maintainable, testable, portable, and stable systems</li> <li>Experience defining and implementing team strategies</li> <li>Experience giving thorough direction and delivering timely, clear feedback</li> <li>Strong art fundamentals that enable the creation of content, prototypes and tools and pipelines that would match the Product Art Direction requirements</li> <li>A strong communicator and able to convey abstract/sophisticated ideas in a concise way, in English or in Mandarin</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience authoring pipeline tool sets for lighting, shaders, and content optimization</li> <li>Experience with 3D math, game engines, and a fundamental understanding of UX/UI principles when applied to tool development </li> <li>Experience managing distributed teams across time zones and in remote work requiredQualifications: You will act as the senior publishing leader for your region, connecting product direction, marketing strategy, and esports delivery to create authentic and impactful experiences for players.</p> <p>You will be accountable for defining and executing publishing strategies that balance global consistency with local relevance, ensuring that each market’s cultural and competitive context is reflected in how we show up.

Your ability to connect insight‑driven strategy with high‑impact execution will be critical in growing VALORANT’s presence, deepening community connection, and delivering on both player and business outcomes.</p> <p>Reporting to the Director of Publishing and Product Management, EMEA,  the Senior Manager, Publishing DACH & EE will be based in Berlin (Germany).</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Develop and own a cohesive multi‑market publishing strategy for your region that delivers against global product goals and local player needs</li> <li>Translate global product priorities into tailored market plans that maximize player engagement and business impact</li> <li>Act as the primary publishing voice for your region in global product discussions, shaping product and publishing decisions with regional insight</li> <li>Lead integrated go‑to‑market plans that connect product beats, esports moments, creator activations, and cultural opportunities</li> <li>Oversee large‑scale budgets, making data‑driven investment decisions across multiple markets</li> <li>Build, guide, and align cross‑disciplinary teams across publishing, esports, community, creative, and commercial functions</li> <li>Track and assess performance across campaigns and markets, applying insights to continuously optimize strategy and execution</li> <li>Cultivate strong relationships with regional partners, media, agencies, and key influencers to amplify VALORANT’s impact across your cluster</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>7+ years in publishing, marketing, or product management, preferably in games, entertainment, or tech</li> <li>Proven experience leading high‑impact, multi‑market campaigns from strategic planning through to execution</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to influence product direction through market insight and player advocacy</li> <li>Strong leadership skills with experience managing cross‑functional and distributed teams</li> <li>Deep understanding of FPS gaming culture and the VALORANT player community</li> <li>Exceptional communication skills, fluent in German and English</li> <li>Strong budget ownership experience with a track record of maximizing ROI across multiple markets</li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience driving publishing strategy for major game launches or sustained live service products across multiple countries</li> <li>Proven success integrating esports, live events, and cultural moments into holistic brand strategies</li> <li>Strong analytical and strategic planning skills, with the ability to translate complex insights into actionable publishing tactics</li> <li>Experience mentoring and developing other publishing professionals</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.  We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games.

If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role!</em></p> <h2>Our Perks:</h2> <p>We offer medical, dental, and vision plans that cover you, your spouse/domestic partner, and children.
Life insurance, parental leave, plus short-term and long-term disability coverage are also available.

opportunities.roleTitle: Staff Software Engineer, Riot Client - Publishing Platform
requiredQualifications: <p>Riot engineers bring deep knowledge of specific technical areas but also value the opportunity to work in many broader domains.

You’ll lead without authority and provide other engineers with a clear illustration of extraordinary engineering.<br><br>Riot Client is the gateway for millions of players to play, discover, and install Riot games, and every single desktop player goes through the Riot Client on their way to experience one of Riot’s games, ensuring their needs, whether they be providing more ways to discover games, engage with Riot’s culture & community, or getting into their game as fast as possible, is the primary goal of the Riot Client team.

Your work will be players' first touchpoint with the wide range of experiences that Riot has to offer, including League of Legends, Wild Rift, Teamfight Tactics, VALORANT, Legends of Runeterra, 2XKO, and beyond, and it is also an essential tool for internal game developers including live games and R&D games. As a <strong>Staff Software Engineer</strong> on the<strong> Riot Client </strong>team, you will drive technical excellence by delivering high-quality solutions and fostering a collaborative, forward-thinking engineering culture.
Working closely with cross-functional partners and collaborating across teams at Riot, you’ll help shape sound architectural decisions that elevate the player experience.

requiredQualifications: <p>At Riot Games, we’re committed to delivering unforgettable esports experiences to fans around the globe.
Riot engineers bring deep knowledge of specific technical areas but also value the opportunity to work across multiple domains.

You will work in a self-guiding, cross-functional team with highly skilled individuals to ensure that Riot's infrastructure is capable of supporting all Riot Esports initiatives. </p> <p>This role may require international travel to support global and regional events.

Expected travel ranges from 10% to 40% depending on event schedules and business needs.</p> <h2>Responsibilities:</h2> <ul> <li>Act as the SME for core infrastructure systems, platforms, and services</li> <li>Design, support and evolve our global esports infrastructure</li> <li>Collaborate within a diverse, cross functional team across engineering and operations</li> <li>Develop technical standards and enable operations teams through documentation, automation, and coaching</li> <li>Participate in global event support as needed, including occasional non standard working hours</li> </ul> <h2>Required Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>5+ years as a Systems, Support or Infrastructure Engineering roles </li> <li>Experience with Ansible and Terraform for automation and configuration management</li> <li>Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins)</li> <li>Experience with virtualization technologies (e.g., VMware, Hyper-V, Proxmox, AHV).</li> <li>Experience designing and operating containerized workloads (e.g., Docker)</li> <li>Experience with imaging and deployment tools (e.g., FOG, SCCM, Autopilot)</li> <li>Expertise in Linux and Windows systems</li> <li>Track record of reducing operational toil through automation<br><br></li> </ul> <h2>Desired Qualifications:</h2> <ul> <li>Experience building or maintaining global infrastructure, systems at scale</li> <li>Experience defining and implementing monitoring, alerting, and observability standards</li> <li>Proficiency in scripting and automation (e.g., PowerShell, Bash)</li> <li>Experience using Git for version control</li> <li>Experience with operating infrastructure in cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure)</li> <li>Relevant certifications such as RHCE or RHCSA, or equivalent hands-on experience, are a plus</li> </ul> <p><em>For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players.

opportunities.roleTitle: Critical Harms Investigations & Incident Management Specialist
requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>Roblox’s Safety Operations team is dedicated to protecting our users from individuals who want to harm others.
As part of our commitment to safety, we are looking for a specialist with an investigator’s mindset, skills, and curiosity to investigate and respond to some of our highest-risk escalations.

You will report to the Critical Harms, Intelligence, Investigations, and Operations Senior Manager.</p> <p>Please Note: This role may review graphic, controversial, and sometimes offensive content in line with Roblox’s content moderation practices. </p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <p><strong>Incident Investigation and Triage</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead, own, and drive rapid investigations into critical and complex incidents, including but not limited to threats against child safety, violent extremism, and other high-severity harms.</li> <li>Utilize internal tools, data analysis, and open-source intelligence (OSINT) techniques to gather evidence, establish facts, and determine the root cause of incidents.</li> <li>Serve as the subject matter expert and primary point of contact for all critical incidents, independently managing communication with executive leadership and cross-functional partners.</li> <li>Ensure all investigations are documented thoroughly, accurately, and completed in a timely manner.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Emergency Response and Coordination</strong></p> <ul> <li>Operate within a 24/7 on-call rotation to respond immediately to high-risk and/or time-sensitive incidents that pose significant risk to users, the platform, or the company.</li> <li>Lead and direct incident response efforts, orchestrating cross-functional teams to ensure a unified and effective investigation and remediation.</li> <li>Strategically draft and deliver real-time, high-stakes communications and strategic recommendations to executive leadership regarding incident status, impact assessment, and mitigation efforts.</li> <li>Architect, own, and continuously iterate on robust incident response playbooks and protocols for various critical harms scenarios.</li> <li>Drive detailed post-mortem reviews (Root Cause Analysis), identifying and implementing structural improvements to policy, process, and technology.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A Bachelor's Degree is required, or, in lieu of a degree, a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in investigations, incident management, and/or policy enforcement on a social platform.</li> <li>Extensive experience (5+ years) managing high-pressure, sensitive, and complex investigations with significant independence and minimal supervision.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical and sensitive issues clearly to executive audiences and non-technical partners.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to use data analysis, internal dashboards, and investigation tools to support fact-finding. </li> <li>Experience mentoring junior investigators and guiding complex casework.</li> <li>Familiarity with online safety issues to include exposure to high-severity risk content is preferred. </li> <li>Strong project management skills, strong prioritization acumen, and the ability to build processes from the ground up.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>As a <strong>Developer Program Manager</strong> within our Strategic Accounts Compliance team, you will be the primary shield and bridge for our most influential creators.

You will ensure that strategic accounts and content remain compliant and thriving on our platform, balancing rigorous safety standards with support experience that minimizes disruption for our most critical partners.</p> <h2><strong>You Will</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Manage High-Stakes Escalations:</strong> Act as the primary point of contact for compliance-related outreach with top creators and strategic accounts, providing clear, actionable guidance to keep their content live and compliant.</li> <li><strong>Serve as a Strategic Liaison:</strong> Bridge the gap between external creators and internal cross-functional teams (Legal, Trust & Safety, Policy, and Operations) to facilitate smooth communication and resolve complex content issues.</li> <li><strong>Minimize Platform Interruption:</strong> Work proactively with internal enforcement teams to prevent unnecessary content takedowns, ensuring strategic assets remain available while corrective actions are addressed.</li> <li><strong>Support Internal Stakeholders:</strong> Respond to internal requests from teams needing to coordinate with strategic accounts for content updates, feedback, or high-level information gathering.</li> <li><strong>Drive Process Improvement:</strong> Don’t just "solve the ticket"—identify recurring friction points and partner with technical teams to improve our internal systems and compliance workflows.</li> <li><strong>Novel Games Initiative support: </strong>Serve as an operational liaison for developers who are expanding the platform’s technical and aesthetic boundaries, facilitating the growth and successful execution of the Novel Games Initiative through proactive platform guidance. </li> </ul> <h2><strong>You Have</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>3–5+ Years of Experience:</strong> Proven track record in community support, program management, or creator relations (Trust & Safety or Compliance experience is a major plus).</li> <li><strong>Masterful Communication:</strong> Ability to translate complex, sensitive policy decisions into clear, empathetic language for both external VIP partners and high-level internal executives.</li> <li><strong>Technical Savvy:</strong> High proficiency with Google Suite and experience with CRM/Ticketing tools (Salesforce, Zendesk).

Ideally, you are "AI-savvy" and eager to leverage new tech to automate and scale manual processes.</li> <li><strong>Crisis Management Skills:</strong> A proven ability to function under significant pressure and navigate high-stakes "fire drills" without losing focus.</li> <li><strong>Documentation Excellence:</strong> Strong technical writing skills with the ability to document complex cases with precision for legal and audit purposes.</li> <li><strong><em>Gaming Industry Fluency:</em></strong><em> Maintains a comprehensive, first-hand understanding of the gaming landscape and an active interest in diverse gaming genres including RPGs, shooters, and strategy mechanics.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>Roblox users expect and deserve a modern, standardized and coherent user experience across all platforms we support (mobile, desktop, console, VR, web, etc.).

This role is based at HQ (no remote option open).</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Define the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for the Consumer Frontend team which consists of Core UI and Luau architecture and Design System with tooling teams.</li> <li>Be the leader for common UI paradigms in the Roblox Consumer Application, providing thought leadership on Roblox UI for both end users and Creators.</li> <li>Invest heavily in relationship building and stakeholder management in order to drive UI standardization and design system adoption. </li> <li>Help define what success looks like for your teams and measure their progress towards it.</li> <li>Personally PM critical projects when required (hands on PM skills as well as management experience required).</li> <li>Grow the PM skills of the team under you, hire when required, represent your team at external events with Creators.</li> <li>Communicate updates, milestones, and priorities effectively to stakeholders across the organization.</li> <li>Stay informed about industry trends and emerging technologies in user interface design and gaming to inform product decisions.</li> <li>Research and deploy AI to drive efficiency and innovation at scale.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of Product Management experience with expertise in shipping high-quality consumer products across multiple platforms.</li> <li>Experience defining, managing, or driving adoption of design systems, UI platforms or platform-wide UI changes.</li> <li>Expertise in navigating platform product development where internal engineers/designers are your primary customers.</li> <li>Deep experience in internal stakeholder management and alignment.</li> <li>Experience leading cross-functional execution with various teams including engineering, data science, design, marketing, partnerships, legal, and policy, to conceptualize, develop, test, and launch impactful UI changes.</li> <li>Experience running complex, platform-wide AB tests and managing resultant trade-off conversations.</li> <li>The ability to clearly communicate roadmaps, priorities, experiments and decisions across a wide spectrum of audiences from partner teams to executive levels.</li> <li>Strong design sensibilities and a history of strong product to design working relationships.</li> <li>Demonstrated technical proficiency and effectiveness working closely with engineers.

Experience with Luau, similar languages, and/or the React framework would be beneficial but are not required.</li> <li>A passion for gaming and a deep understanding of game UI or multi-platform UI delivery would be beneficial but is not a requirement.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A Product leader with a history of delivering high quality UI/UX work either directly or through a design system.</li> <li>Experienced, with 10+ years of product management experience or equivalent and a history of delivering across multiple platforms at scale.</li> <li>Analytical, with experience running complex AB tests to conclusion.</li> <li>Design-orientated with a passion for high quality user experiences.</li> <li>An excellent communicator and documenter, with fantastic listening, verbal, and written communication skills.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><h3>Engineering Manager, Home Infrastructure</h3> <p>The Home Infrastructure team builds the mission-critical backend and data systems that power Roblox’s Homepage and Experience Details Page, two of the highest-traffic surfaces on Roblox.

You will guide the team’s technical strategy, grow engineering talent, and drive execution on high-impact systems that operate at massive scale.</p> <p><strong>You Will</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead and grow a high-performing team of Backend and Data Engineers responsible for the infrastructure powering Roblox’s Homepage and other Discovery product surfaces.</li> <li>Define and execute the technical roadmap for large-scale content discovery, personalization, ranking, data, and backend-serving systems.</li> <li>Drive high-impact initiatives such as Personalization-as-a-Platform, full-page personalization, real-time user signal infrastructure, and ranking observability.</li> <li>Partner closely with Machine Learning, Data Science, Product, Design, Frontend, Ads, Marketplace, Economy, Search, and Core Infrastructure teams to deliver measurable product impact.</li> <li>Build a strong engineering culture focused on technical excellence, reliability, experimentation, operational health, and talent development.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience as an Engineering Manager or Tech Lead Manager, ideally leading backend, data, ranking, recommendation, search, ads, or personalization teams.</li> <li>Strong technical depth in distributed systems, service-oriented architecture, high-throughput backend platforms, data infrastructure, or ML-powered serving systems.</li> <li>Experience leading teams that build and operate large-scale, consumer-facing production systems with high reliability and performance requirements.</li> <li>A track record of delivering complex, ambiguous, cross-functional technical initiatives with measurable product or business impact.</li> <li>Experience growing engineers, developing technical leaders, and building healthy, high-performing engineering teams.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Are</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Technical and strategic</strong>: Able to guide architecture, roadmap, and execution across complex backend, data, and personalization systems.</li> <li><strong>Impact-oriented</strong>: Focused on building systems that improve user experience, creator success, and Roblox’s long-term growth.</li> <li><strong>Data-driven</strong>: Comfortable using metrics, experimentation, and evidence to guide product and engineering decisions.</li> <li><strong>Collaborative</strong>: Effective at partnering across Product, ML, Data Science, Design, and engineering teams to align priorities and drive outcomes.</li> <li><strong>A talent multiplier</strong>: Invested in coaching engineers, raising the engineering bar, and creating an environment where the team can do its best work.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>For roles that are based at our headquarters in San Mateo, CA: The starting base pay for this position is as shown below.
The actual base pay is dependent upon a variety of job-related factors such as professional background, training, work experience, location, business needs and market demand.

human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>The Administration team at Roblox provides core administrative support and serves as a strategic partners to our business leaders.</p> <h2><strong>You Will:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Provide strategic partnership to the Senior Vice President of Strategy and Operations and his leadership team. </li> <li>Manage highly sensitive and confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity, serving as a trusted partner within the Office of the CEO to handle executive communications, strategic plans, and sensitive materials seamlessly.</li> <li>Translate high-level strategic objectives into actionable operational frameworks, developing repeatable playbooks, standardized processes, and tracking mechanisms to ensure flawless execution.</li> <li>Act as a highly collaborative liaison across various teams, executive levels, and external partners, building strong relationships and fostering a cohesive environment to align priorities and drive company-wide goals forward.</li> <li>Expertly manage complex and dynamic international calendars with significant movement, including proactive planning, preparing meeting materials and briefs, and anticipating scheduling conflicts. </li> <li>Leverages strategic foresight to design and implement innovative solutions, proactively resolving bottlenecks and optimizing business operations.</li> <li>Drive and manage team programs and projects, working closely with executives to define scope and ensure progress.</li> <li>Plan and execute impactful team events, including team building activities, off-sites, summits, and other gatherings. </li> <li>Serve as a gatekeeper for executives, ensuring their time is optimized.</li> <li>Maintain communication channels, meeting notes, project plans, goals, group tasks, and help track key deliverables.</li> <li>Meticulously coordinate international and domestic travel arrangements.</li> <li>Submit accurate and timely expense reports.</li> <li>Draft, edit, and prepare presentations, reports, and other meeting deliverables.</li> <li>Engage in frequent written and verbal correspondence with high-profile external clients and partners.</li> <li>Collaborate effectively with peers, colleagues, and across various teams to support company-wide projects and goals.</li> <li>Contribute to a positive, collaborative, and inclusive team culture.</li> <li>Work a full-time, hybrid schedule at our San Mateo office.</li> </ul> <p> </p> <h2><strong>You Have:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>A Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, with 8+ years in a direct executive support role.</li> <li>Exceptional attention to detail, a proactive and driven approach, and the ability to initiate and complete projects with limited information or resources, finding creative solutions to challenges.</li> <li>Proven experience managing projects effectively and meeting deadlines, utilizing various communication and project management tools.</li> <li>A strong team-oriented mindset, always willing to assist colleagues and contribute to shared success.</li> <li>Excellent judgment and a meticulous approach to your work.</li> <li>Ability to work flexible hours as needed to support international leaders and teams.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>You Are:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Highly organized and proficient in calendaring (adept at handling frequent changes and complex scheduling), communication (e.g., Slack, G-Suite), and document management tools.</li> <li>Experienced in supporting C suite executives in a highly matrix environment.</li> <li>Professional, calm, collected, and highly adaptable in high-pressure situations, demonstrating flexibility and the ability to pivot quickly when crises or unexpected ad-hoc requests arise.</li> <li>Experienced in handling confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.</li> <li>Passionate about technology, with an ability to quickly learn, create, and share new ideas to improve efficiency and processes.</li> <li>Responsive and reliable, consistently following through on requests and tasks.</li> <li>A strong relationship builder, able to establish rapport with individuals across all levels of the organization and serve as a dependable representative for your executives and team.</li> <li>Ability to forge relationships across teams and with peers.</li> <li>A high-performing, self-motivated operator with a collaborative spirit.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 14px;">For roles that are based at our headquarters in San Mateo, CA: The starting base pay for this position is as shown below.
The actual base pay is dependent upon a variety of job-related factors such as professional background, training, work experience, location, business needs and market demand.

This pay range is subject to change and may be modified in the future. <em>Please note that not all benefits on <a href="https://careers.roblox.com/total-rewards">this page</a> are applicable to this hourly position.</em></span></p></div><div class="title">Hourly Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$76.96</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$92.53 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

Public Policy </p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop and advance strategic law enforcement relationships with special focus on law enforcement in the State of Nevada, while assisting with global outreach as needed.</li> <li>Coordinate with federal, state, and local law enforcement, including with the Nevada Attorney General’s Office</li> <li>Plan and execute educational programs for law enforcement agencies and other key external stakeholders regarding Roblox’s platform safety efforts, including our law enforcement response policies and NCMEC CyberTip initiatives. </li> regional law enforcement concerns, while helping internally codify and scale resultant learnings.</li> <li>Forge a deep subject-matter expertise of Roblox’s internal and external safety practices, so as to identify, advocate for, and help implement strategic safety enhancements.</li> <li>Draft professional work product – for both internal and external audiences – supported by clear, concise, and multi-sourced platform safety investigations.</li> <li>Collaborate and build strong internal relationships across our Legal & Advocacy, Safety, Product, and Communications teams (among others) to help address law enforcement emergencies, platform safety escalations, and comprehensive Roblox undertakings.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of work experience in law enforcement, intelligence, government, trust and safety, or an adjacent field.</li> <li>Detailed knowledge of the law enforcement community and related policymakers in the State of Nevada, along with current trends and challenges in online safety and policy (particularly child safety and regional-specific considerations).</li> <li>Enthusiasm for and a demonstrated track record of stellar public speaking, short-notice travel, building and maintaining constructive relationships, defining your own work processes, and adding organizational value no matter how small or large the task.</li> <li>Outstanding communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.</li> <li>Agility to navigate ambiguity, resilience to overcome obstacles, and the internal drive to concurrently manage multiple high-profile, time-sensitive initiatives in a dynamic environment.</li> <li>Unwavering integrity, collegiality, and grit.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p>We are seeking a highly motivated Senior Analyst, Tools and Systems Administrator to manage the implementation and innovation of tooling initiatives across our Operations teams.

You will help build a premier suite of agent tooling by managing systematic changes, identifying improvements, and delivering exceptional customer service.</p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Administer and configure applications to support 24/7 operations, including Zendesk, Absorb, Qualtrics, JIRA and other 3rd party and internally developed tools.</li> <li>Analyze and translate business requirements into technical requirements, coordinating with operations teams to evaluate new functionality and implement tooling.</li> <li>Support vendor team onboarding and off-boarding, including account creation, access provisioning, and the setup and troubleshooting of provisioned tools.</li> <li>Respond to and resolve ad-hoc tickets from internal and vendor facing teams via Jira, while monitoring Slack pings, emails, and collaborating with global operational teams.</li> <li>Work proactively with internal and external teams to identify, analyze, and resolve tool-related issues before problems arise, ensuring all incident management protocols are diligently followed.</li> <li>Maintain detailed documentation and provide regular reports on configuration, experience and support activities.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of experience in tools and systems administration, focusing heavily on end-user support, alongside 2+ years of experience with CRM, IVR, LMS, Knowledge Management tools, live channel support systems, integrations, and database administration.</li> <li>2+ years of experience owning the end-to-end implementation, instrumentation, and integration of front and back-office applications.</li> <li>The ability to use data to identify and lead decision-making for process improvements that enhance operational efficiencies.</li> <li>Experience collaborating and communicating technical information clearly to management, product development teams, and both technical and non-technical users.</li> <li>Leveraged AI / LLM based tools to solve complex problems.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Analytical & Innovative: You are excited to investigate large, ambiguous problems, measure solutions, and execute out-of-the-box ideas to mitigate emerging risks.</li> <li>A Proactive Problem Solver: You anticipate potential problems, take decisive action to solve them autonomously, and prioritize effectively.</li> <li>Customer-Focused: You are passionate about delivering exceptional customer service and resolving issues efficiently while managing conflicting priorities for internal and external customers.</li> <li>Team-Oriented: You lift up your peers, work effectively as part of a global team, and are able to work flexible hours to adapt to changing priorities.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><h3><strong>About the role:</strong></h3> <p>As the Product Manager for UI Ecosystems, you’ll own the overarching vision and strategy for Foundation, Roblox’s design system.
Roblox users expect and deserve a modern, standardized and coherent user experience and Foundation is how we deliver that.</p> <p>You’ll report to the Director of Product for Consumer Frontend.

This role is based at HQ (no remote option open).</p> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Define the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for UI ecosystems and the Foundation design system.</li> <li>Help envision and build a unified, highly scalable, robust design system that empowers teams across Roblox to build high quality UI/UX.</li> <li>Help prioritize, track and measure design system completeness, as well as overall adoption and impact across the company.</li> <li>Shepard component migrations through AB and holdout testing to be certain of positive user impact, leading complex trade-off discussions where necessary.</li> <li>Help triage and prioritize all inbound requests for support from designers, PMs, and engineers across the company.</li> <li>Evangelize and drive accessibility improvements through both design system iteration and consulting with customer teams on their implementations.</li> <li>Communicate updates, milestones, and priorities effectively to stakeholders across the organization.</li> <li>Be the public face of Foundation with our Creators at events like our annual Roblox Developers Conference.</li> <li>Stay informed about industry trends and emerging technologies in user interface design and gaming to inform product decisions.</li> <li>Research and deploy AI to drive efficiency and innovation at scale.</li> <li>Grow your career with a company that is exploding.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>You have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of Product Management experience with expertise in shipping high-quality consumer products across multiple platforms.</li> <li>Bachelor’s level degree in a relevant field (computer science, product management, design) or years of relevant experience.</li> <li>Strong design sensibilities and a history of strong product to design working relationships.</li> <li>Experience defining, managing, or driving adoption of design systems, UI platforms or platform-wide UI changes.</li> <li>Experience running complex, platform-wide AB tests and managing resultant trade-off conversations.</li> <li>Expertise in navigating platform product development where internal engineers/designers are your primary customers.</li> <li>Experience leading cross-functional execution with various teams including engineering, data science, design, marketing, partnerships, legal, and policy, to conceptualize, develop, test, and launch impactful UI changes.</li> <li>Deep experience in internal stakeholder management and alignment.</li> <li>Demonstrated technical proficiency and effectiveness working closely with engineers.

You will conduct deep-dive investigations into systemic errors, poor agent behaviors and other gaps, and advocate for fixes.</li> <li>Maintain high-integrity data on every case you handle, helping to turn raw ticket information into insights that we share with Product and Engineering teams.</li> <li>Partner directly with Product Support, Legal, Ad Ops, Developer Relations and more to provide updates on high-profile cases and emerging trends.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>You Have</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3+ years in a high-tier support, Trust & Safety, or operations role (Executive or Legal escalations experience is a massive plus).</li> <li>You enjoy "detective work." You’re comfortable digging through logs and data to find the needle in the haystack.</li> <li>You can translate complex customer challenges into clear, concise updates.</li> <li>You are comfortable with ambiguity and excited by the challenge of building and partnering with vendor teams to coordinate and execute on tickets.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, Operations, or a related field.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>You Are</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Discreet & Reliable:</strong> You understand the sensitivity of high-risk work and can be trusted with confidential information.</li> <li><strong>Proactive:</strong> You don’t wait for a manual to be written; you help write it.</li> <li><strong>Resilient:</strong> You stay calm under pressure, especially when dealing with tight deadlines and high-visibility cases.</li> <li><strong>Collaborative:</strong> You’re a team player who is happy to mentor vendor partners today and help onboard new internal peers tomorrow.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>The Logistics</strong></h3> <ul> <li>This role requires collaboration with team members based in California, USA.</li> <li>This role requires on-call work and weekends on a rotational basis to ensure 24/7 coverage for high-priority risks.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).</p> <p>Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

requiredQualifications: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life.

Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device.</span><strong> </strong><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there. </span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>Roblox Studio is the creation engine behind millions of immersive 3D games built by creators around the world.

This is a hands-on individual-contributor role operating at the intersection of platform engineering, AI systems, and developer experience, where you will set the technical direction, design the architecture, and write the code.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Design and build</strong> the agentic AI systems at the core of the AI-Native IDE (planning, execution, validation, evaluation) so they are production-grade and reliable.</li> <li><strong>Decide how Studio uses</strong> coding models, agents, retrieval, tool calling, and context management across the Assistant and the broader creator workflow.</li> <li><strong>Own the quality bar and evaluation strategy</strong>, standing up quantitative and qualitative eval pipelines, including human-in-the-loop, so we ship with confidence.</li> <li><strong>Optimize these systems</strong> for latency, throughput, and cost (caching, routing, distillation, quantization).</li> <li><strong>Bring reusable patterns and best practices</strong> to teams across Studio, raising the applied-AI fluency of Studio engineering.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You have:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>12+ years of engineering experience</strong>, including ownership of large-scale, long-lived platforms.</li> <li><strong>Deep, hands-on experience</strong> building LLM-powered and agentic systems in production, beyond chat-based interfaces.</li> <li><strong>Strong systems and software engineering skills</strong>, with the ability to design the architecture and write the code.</li> <li><strong>A track record of defining evaluation frameworks</strong> for AI product quality, combining automated metrics with human review, and optimizing inference for latency, throughput, and cost.</li> <li><strong>Strong background in developer tools</strong> or IDE-like platforms, with a proven ability to set technical direction and raise quality across multiple teams as an individual contributor.</li> <li><em>Preferred Qualifications:</em> Background in coding models or code-generation systems, and/or research experience in reinforcement learning (RLHF, RLAIF, preference modeling) or related model-training techniques.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You are:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>An innovative technical leader</strong> who wants to build the AI systems that power the creativity of millions.</li> <li><strong>Product-minded</strong>, with a real understanding of developer needs, creator workflows, and how AI systems land in the user experience.</li> <li><strong>Adaptable and curious</strong>, with good judgment about when to build, when to reuse, and when to push a need back to a model team.</li> <li><strong>Able to operate at the deepest technical levels</strong> and still communicate direction clearly to partners.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>For roles that are based at our headquarters in San Mateo, CA: The starting base pay for this position is as shown below.
The actual base pay is dependent upon a variety of job-related factors such as professional background, training, work experience, location, business needs and market demand.
